issues.issue: Description says 'send/cancel icon switching' but omits the third visual state: loading renders a spinner (Spin), not an icon switch. The description implies only two icon states exist.
issues.suggestion: A submit button component with state management through props. Shows an arrow-up icon when enabled, a spinner when loading, and a stop icon when cancelable.

issues.issue: Description says 'status indicator' but the source renders a Loader (loading spinner), not a generic status indicator. The copy button visible in the source is also omitted entirely.
issues.suggestion: A message component that displays AI thinking process with collapsible content, a loading spinner shown while thinking is in progress, and a copy button available after the thought completes.

issues.issue: Description says 'status message' for what the source calls 'content' (React.ReactNode). The loading spinner controlled by showLoader is not mentioned at all.
issues.suggestion: Footer component for tool messages with action buttons, optional content text, and an optional loading spinner (shown by default while the tool is processing).

issues.issue: Description omits the 'content' prop (React.ReactNode) which is rendered between the tool name and the actions area.
issues.suggestion: Header component for tool messages with icon, name, optional inline content, action buttons, and a status indicator.
